name: igggy
description: Igggy — AI structured meeting notes in your Obsidian vault

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && npm run check:no-core
scripts.check:no-core: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));if(pkg.dependencies?.['@igggy/core']||pkg.devDependencies?.['@igggy/core']){console.error('FAIL: @igggy/core found in package.json');process.exit(1)}const js=fs.readFileSync('main.js','utf8');const checks=['You are a transcript analyst','buildSummarizationPrompt','buildAnalysisPrompt'];for(const s of checks){if(js.includes(s)){console.error('FAIL: Prompt IP found in main.js: '+s);process.exit(1)}}console.log('check:no-core passed — no IP leakage detected')"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build

author: Andrew Lassetter
